meaning: adj.每小时的,每小时一次的,时时的adv.每小时一次,随时
examples: Hourly output by workers declined 1.3% in the first quarter.
Just .6 percent of full-time workers and 1.7 percent of full-time hourly workers earn the minimum.
Ford, limping through a turnaround effort, needs to close factories and shed excess hourly workers.
